nodes.name: Streptocitta
nodes.summary: Streptocitta（Streptocitta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Bare-eyed myna、White-necked myna。

nodes.name: White-necked myna
nodes.summary: White-necked myna（Streptocitta albicollis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-necked myna。

nodes.name: White-necked myna
nodes.summary: The white-necked myna (Streptocitta albicollis) is a large, long-tailed species of starling in the family Sturnidae. Due to its superficial resemblance to a magpie, it has been referred to as the Celebes magpie or Sulawesi magpie in the past. It is endemic to forests on Sulawesi and adjacent smaller islands in Indonesia. There are two subspecies: the nominate from the southern part of Sulawesi has a yellow-tipped bill, and torquata from the northern part of the island has an all-black bill. References
